item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - EmailPro / Hosted Exchange / MX Plan Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Jul 14, 19:15 UTC
Update - Scheduled maintenance is still in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 14, 18:42 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 14, 18:40 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Collaborative solutions offer.

Start time : 14/07/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 15/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : The Microsoft Exchange service may be experiencing intermittent unavailability or increased latency for EmailPro, Hosted Exchange and MX Plan.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Collaborative solutions.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .DE
item.description:
Jul 14, 10:07 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our .DE Domains offering has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 15:00 UTC
End time : 14/07/2026 09:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 15:30 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .DE Domains offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .DE domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .DE domains.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz398 Cluster107 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 14, 04:33 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 14/05/2026 04:16 UTC
End time : 14/07/2026 04:18 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 14, 04:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Filerz398 Cluster107.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 14/05/2026 04:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz398 is unreachable on the Cluster107.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
